title: sdlc.models.json
description: Per-project panel model roster for the sdlc skill. Frozen surface FS2.

phases.description: Exactly the four v1 phases; each required.

prefer.description: Ordered provider/model preference strings. Each entry may optionally carry pi's ':<thinking>' suffix (e.g. 'openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol:high') to set a reasoning level for that specific model when resolved into a panel; valid levels are off, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh, max. This is intentionally NOT validated against that enum: some providers (e.g. amazon-bedrock) use a trailing ':<version>' in the model id itself (such as 'amazon-bedrock/anthropic.claude-opus-4-8-v1:0') which is not a thinking suffix at all — rejecting unrecognized colon-suffixes would wrongly break those. Validate model strings by shape only, as elsewhere in this schema.
